---
title: "expr_compare_example"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```



```{r}

LRAA_compare = read.csv("LRAA.ref_quant_compare.tsv", header=T, sep="\t")

LRAA_compare %>% head()
```

```{r}

LRAA_compare %>% ggplot(aes(y=log1p(LRAA_tpm), x=log1p(ref_tpm))) + geom_point() + theme_bw()



```
